# Laravel Project Rules

## General
- This is a Laravel 13 project.
- Use PHP 8.5.
- Follow Laravel best practices.

## Safety
- Do not delete files.
- Do not modify .env without asking.
- Do not run database migrations automatically.
- Do not run Docker commands without asking.
- Explain changes before applying them.

## Code Style
- Keep controllers thin.
- Use Form Requests for validation.
- Use services for business logic.

## Before changing code
- Show a summary of changes.
- Explain possible side effects.
